about.title: About LootNest
about.p1: LootNest was born from a simple obsession: finding the coolest, weirdest, and most useful products on the internet and sharing them with the world.
about.p2: Our mission is simple — find interesting products, test them thoroughly, and give you our honest, unfiltered opinion. No sponsored reviews. No pay-for-play. Just real people testing real products.
about.p3: If it's great, we'll tell you. If it sucks, we'll tell you that too. Our reviews are 100% independent — no brand sponsorships, no pay-for-play. Just honest, real-world testing.
about.submitCTA: Got a product we should review? Submit it here →

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Got a question, suggestion, or just want to say hi? Drop us a message.
contact.name: Name

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: LootNest ("we," "our," or "us") values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you visit our website.
privacy.p2: We collect information you voluntarily provide, such as your name and email address when you subscribe to our newsletter or submit a contact form. We also automatically collect certain information through cookies and analytics tools.
privacy.p3: We collect information you voluntarily provide, such as your name and email address when you subscribe to our newsletter or submit a contact form. We also automatically collect certain information through cookies and analytics tools.
privacy.p4: We use your information to send newsletters, respond to inquiries, improve our website, and analyze how visitors interact with our content.
privacy.p5: We may use third-party services such as Google Analytics. These services may collect information about your browsing activity.
privacy.p6: If you have questions about this policy, please contact us through our contact page.

affiliate.title: Editorial Policy
affiliate.p1: At LootNest, our reviews are driven by one thing: honest, hands-on experience. We test every product we feature, and our opinions are never for sale.
affiliate.p2: We do not accept payment or free products in exchange for positive reviews. If a product is great, we'll say so. If it has flaws, you'll hear about those too.
affiliate.p3: From time to time, we may use affiliate links to help support the site. When we do, it never affects our ratings or recommendations — we'll always be upfront about it.
affiliate.tldr: TL;DR: Real reviews, real opinions. No brand tells us what to say. Affiliate links, if any, will be clearly disclosed.
